headline: Netflix Live Push And Merchandising Raise Fresh Questions For Valuation
summary: Netflix (NasdaqGS:NFLX) is expanding into daily live programming with the launch of "The Breakfast Club" as its first daily live show. The company is broadening consumer engagement beyond streaming through new partnerships with Moose Toys and Ferrero. Moose Toys will develop toy lines tied to upcoming Netflix Kids & Family titles, while Ferrero plans Wonka branded products linked to the "Charlie vs. the Chocolate Factory" animated film. For investors tracking Netflix, this push into live...

headline: Is Netflix, Inc. (NFLX) One of the Best Communication Stocks to Invest In?
summary: Netflix, Inc. (NASDAQ:NFLX) is one of the best communication stocks to invest in. JPMorgan reiterated an Overweight rating on Netflix, Inc. (NASDAQ:NFLX) on May 14, setting a price target of $118. The rating update came after the company’s fourth annual advertising upfront, with the firm stating that it is positive on the company’s content strategy, reach, […]
